PlayerProgress.title: PlayerProgress
PlayerProgress.description: Represents the active progress, XP, answers, and badges of a player.

username.description: The unique nickname chosen by the user.

avatar.description: Browser-compressed Base64 string of the avatar, or standard preset emoji.

xp.description: The accumulated Experience Points of the player.

badges.description: List of string identifiers for earned badges.

answers.description: Map containing choice responses to phases 1, 2, 3, 4, and 6.

fragments.description: Array of indices representing unlocked fragment parts.

presenceConfirmed.description: Flag showing whether presence has been confirmed at the venue.

lastAccess.description: Timestamp of the last sync operation.

friendCode.description: A unique, random social code for networking.

connectedFriendCodes.description: List of friend codes connected by the user.

/players/{userId}.description: Saves the player progress, indexed by the user's anonymous Firebase Authentication UID.
